texto: Lobbing hand grenades on the bride of Christ takes zero talent or effort. I also think this really ticks God off. My five-year-old child complains and whines when things aren't the way she wants them, but courageous men and women roll up their sleeves and get busy. I want to be an active participant in putting back together the broken pieces.
explicacao: Citação de Mike Foster sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Lobbing hand grenades on the bride of Christ takes zero talent or effort.
